{"id":"project-LICHEN-kb33","title":"_Nonnull return annotation violated by lichen_meshcore_adapter_get_stats","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/include/lichen/meshcore/adapter.h
Line: 164-166

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c
Line: 1253-1258

The header declares the function as returning _Nonnull:
```c
const struct lichen_meshcore_adapter_stats *_Nonnull
lichen_meshcore_adapter_get_stats(
    const struct lichen_meshcore_adapter *_Nonnull adapter);
```

But the implementation can return NULL:
```c
return adapter == NULL ? NULL : &adapter->stats;
```

This violates the API contract. Callers trusting the _Nonnull annotation could dereference NULL.

Fix: Either remove the _Nonnull annotation on return type, or assert/crash if adapter is NULL instead of returning NULL.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:52.978077Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:52.978111Z"}
